name: Alchemy Investments Acquisition Corp 1
business: Alchemy Investments Acquisition Corp 1 is a blank check company incorporated to effect a merger or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has no operations or revenue to date and intends to focus on deep technology with an emphasis on data analytics. On August 22, 2025, it entered into a Business Combination Agreement with Cartiga, LLC, subject to shareholder approval and other conditions.

exposures.sentence: This data may be used to enable and deliver applications such as: remote sensing, telecommunications, financial trading, environmental monitoring, greenhouse gas emissions monitoring, business intelligence, precision agriculture, infrastructure monitoring, space traffic monitoring and management, data science, and their adjacent industries.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until September 9, 2026, so long as the Company deposits $22,126 each month, to consummate our initial business combination.

catalysts.event: Expected closing of Business Combination with Cartiga
catalysts.sentence: The proposed transaction is expected to close in the first quarter of 2026, following the receipt of the required approval by the Company's shareholders and the fulfillment of customary closing conditions.
